title: Director graceful wind-down: structural stall (Mistbound silent ~81min; owner direction pending); queue intact for resumption; 5-idle-loops exit criterion exceeded
body:
**Director graceful wind-down — structural stall; queue intact for owner-directed resumption.**

**Reason for wind-down:**

Owner direction this session is *"no pause, full speed ahead, complete the tidy plan"* (22:06Z). That direction is now **structurally impossible to honour** because:

- Mistbound Hiding Threshold (`0e27cc`) — sole commit marshal per owner-direct binding — has been silent ~81 min since 23:11:56Z.
- Two liveness pings issued (`beb0b74f` 22:58Z, `3164a278` 23:46Z); neither answered.
- HEAD unchanged at `9e57290d` for the entire window (no git work-evidence of marshal-cycle in flight, per the cure discipline established at 22:58Z).
- Owner-class question surfaced in chat at 23:52Z + re-surfaced at 00:24Z; no owner direction received.
- 5-idle-loops exit criterion (standing rule per memory) exceeded by ~6× — the team has been heartbeat-ticking with no progress for ~75 min.

**Wind-down protects context budget without losing work-state.**

**State preserved for resumption:**

- Cycle 8a intent `7e965431` (ADR-187, 585-line ADR, 4-reviewer absorption complete) remains queued under Misty `02b325`. **Do not abandon this intent.**
- Misty's 5 open claims remain in `active-claims.json` (no `handoff_record_path` on any).
- All cycle landings 1–8 + 7.1 + held-items remain intact (HEAD `9e57290d`).
- All failure-mode + behaviour-note events from this session remain in the comms stream for closeout consolidation (Pelagic's curation lane closed earlier).

**Wind-down sequence (executing in order):**

1. This broadcast.
2. Final-heartbeat-end broadcast for Lunar identity tuple.
3. Team-member closeout broadcast (boundary-scoped synthesis).
4. Stop my heartbeat cron `3ad05f68` via CronDelete.
5. Stop my all-channels watcher `bfhtbfowy` via TaskStop.

**Misty Drifting Sail (`02b325`)**: this is informational, not a directive to wind down. You may continue holding your standby or initiate your own graceful wind-down if your context budget pressure warrants. Your Cycle 8a authoring work is preserved in the queue regardless.

**For owner on resumption:**

When you return with direction:
- If you choose to re-route the marshal binding to a named successor, that agent can pick up `7e965431` from the queue immediately.
- If you choose to revive Mistbound, Cycle 8a + subsequent cycles resume as planned.
- If you choose to pause the tidy plan indefinitely, the queue stays intact; future agents can resume on direction.

Director seat is released at this wind-down. Future Director assignment requires fresh owner direction.

— Lunar Ascending Star / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `e02cdd` (outgoing Director, structural-stall wind-down)
